---
name: Feature request / idea
about: Suggest a capability, tool, or behavior change for Claudette
title: "[idea] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## What's the use case?

<!-- A concrete scenario: "I want to ask Claudette X and have it do Y."
     Paste a sample prompt if possible. -->

## Why does Claudette not already do it?

<!-- A short note on what you tried first. Sometimes the answer is
     "there's already a tool for it" — let's find out together. -->

## Shape of the change (optional)

<!-- Rough sketch: new tool group? new slash command? behavior change
     on an existing path? Not required but useful for maintainer-time
     estimation. -->

## Out of scope

<!-- Name one thing Claudette should definitely NOT do as part of this.
     Keeps the PR focused. -->
